title: pilosella longisquama
intro: Pilosella longisquama, also known as Rough Hawk's Beard or Rough Mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella longisquama include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Pilosella longisquama can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
